# Welcome Email Sequence — The Vibe Check Project
**For:** MailerLite (set up as an automation workflow)
**Trigger:** New subscriber signs up via any form on the site
**Schedule:** Email 1 immediately, Email 2 on Day 2, Email 3 on Day 5

---

## EMAIL 1 — Day 0 (send immediately on signup)
**Subject:** Your first vibe is here ✨

---

Hey [first_name|there],

Welcome to The Vibe Check Project. You just made a good call.

Here's your first affirmation — no strings, no fluff:

> **"You are allowed to take up space. Your needs matter. Your feelings are valid."**

Save that. Screenshot it. Send it to someone who needs it.

---

**While you're here — here are 3 free mobile wallpapers of our most popular affirmations:**

*(You can download and share these however you like)*

1. "You're doing better than you think you are." — [Download Wallpaper 1](https://www.thevibecheckproject.com/assets/wallpapers/wallpaper_1_better.png)
2. "Rest is not weakness. It's essential." — [Download Wallpaper 2](https://www.thevibecheckproject.com/assets/wallpapers/wallpaper_2_rest.png)
3. "Your presence makes a difference, even when you don't see it." — [Download Wallpaper 3](https://www.thevibecheckproject.com/assets/wallpapers/wallpaper_3_presence.png)

---

Every Sunday I send a free card pack — 5 affirmation cards you can send to people you care about.

Talk soon,
Devin @ The Vibe Check Project

---

## EMAIL 2 — Day 2
**Subject:** Why I started this (the real story)

---

Hey [first_name|there],

Two days ago you signed up. I want to tell you why this project exists.

A while back, I was going through a rough stretch. Not the kind you post about — the quiet kind, where everything looks fine from the outside but inside you're running on empty.

Someone sent me a simple message. Three sentences. It wasn't profound. But it arrived on exactly the right day and it reminded me that someone was thinking about me.

That's it. That was the whole thing. That's why The Vibe Check Project exists.

I built this so that feeling — that "someone sees me" feeling — is something anyone can give to anyone else, for free, in about 60 seconds.

---

**Want to give that feeling to someone today?**

[Send a Free Card →](https://www.thevibecheckproject.com/send-card.html)

Pick someone. Takes one minute. You never know which day is the day someone needed to hear from you.

Talk soon,
Devin

---

## EMAIL 3 — Day 5
**Subject:** Want more? Here's what Premium actually is.

---

Hey [first_name|there],

You've been getting vibes for a few days now. Hopefully they're hitting right.

There are two ways to go deeper — and they do completely different things. Here's the honest breakdown:

---

**If you want a better tool for sending cards to others:**

- Works instantly in your browser — yours forever, no subscription

This is for people who use the card tool regularly and want it to hit harder. One payment, no recurring charges.

[Unlock Premium Now — $4.99 →](https://buy.stripe.com/14A8wPd160dd9Cz0n11VK02)

---

Not required. The free newsletter keeps coming no matter what.

Talk soon,
Devin @ The Vibe Check Project

P.S. Reply to this email anytime. I actually read them.

---

## HOW TO SET THIS UP IN MAILERLITE

1. Go to **app.mailerlite.com** → Log in → **Automations** → **Create workflow**
2. Trigger: **"When subscriber joins a group"** → select your newsletter group
3. Add 3 email steps:
   - Step 1: Send Email 1 → Delay: **0 minutes** (immediately)
   - Step 2: Send Email 2 → Delay: **2 days**
   - Step 3: Send Email 3 → Delay: **5 days**
4. Paste each email's subject and body into the corresponding step
5. **Before activating:** Double check the subject lines and that all URLs look correct.
6. Click **Activate**

That's it. Every new subscriber gets this automatically from here on.
